MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ANITA GABRIELLE CARSWELL Renewed Notice Of Plaintiffs' Amended Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Defts' Motion For Summary Judgment
APPEARANCES:
Christine L. Garcia, Esq. ANIMAL LAW, 3824 18th Street, Suite 102, San Francisco, CA 94114, 415-297-3109, appeared on behalf of plaintiff and moving party Anita Gabrielle Carswell.

Brian Gearinger, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY, 1390 Market Steet, Sixth Floor, San Francisco, CA 94102, 415-554-3914, appeared on behalf of defendant City and County of San Francisco.

There was no tentative ruling issued. The motion was argued and denied. The request for sanctions was withdrawn by the moving party. An order was signed in open court. (JJM/pb) Honorable James J. McBride. Reported by Joyce Long, CSR# 8620 (gps)

AMENDED DEMURRER
Off Calendar Aug-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Christine L. Garcia, Esq. 846-9871 for pltfs & opposing parties; Brian Gearinger, Deputy City Atty 554-3914 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (DEMURRER OVERRULED. COMPLAINT DOES NOT FACIALLY DISCLOSE THAT ACTION IS TIME BARRED. IMPROPER TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF DEFENDANT'S MAILING PRACTICES ON DEMURRER. SEE DE CRUZ V. COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES, (1995) 173 CAL.APP.3D 1131). Pltf to submit order. (AJR/PB)

MOTION Notice Of A Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiffs Anita Gabrille And Joshua Brandon Trentor And Plaintiffs' Counsel Christine Garcia By Defendant Ccsf
Off Calendar Aug-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Christine L. Garcia, Esq. 846-9871 for pltfs & opposing parties; Brian Gearinger, Deputy City Atty 554-3914 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (DENY. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH SAFE HARBOR PERIOD, SEE CCP 128.7(C)(1) AND COMPLAINT NOT FRIVOLOUS). Pltf to submit order. (AJR/PB)
